zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Bulstrode於1458年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾潔利時，他的父親Richard Bulstrode39歲，母親Alice Knyffe34歲。他於1484年與Mary Empson在英國米德萊可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1517年8月2日在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利 瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Bulstrode于1458年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾潔利时，他的父亲Richard Bulstrode39岁，母亲Alice Knyffe34岁。他于1484年与Mary Empson在英国米德萊可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1517年8月2日在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利 瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Bulstrode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bolstridge
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of Bulstrode, a habitational name from Bulstrode in Buckinghamshire, meaning ‘bull marsh’ from Old English bula ‘bull’ + strōd ‘marshy land’.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Bulstrode was born in 1458, in Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Bulstrode, was 39 and his mother, Alice Knyffe, was 34. He married Mary Empson in 1484, in Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 2 August 1517, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Bulstrode est né en 1458, à Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Bulstrode, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Alice Knyffe, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Mary Empson en 1484, à Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 2 août 1517, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Bulstrode 1458 in Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Bulstrode 39 und seine Mutter Alice Knyffe 34. Er hat 1484 in Middlesex, England Mary Empson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 2. August 1517 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Bulstrodeが1458年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアヘジャーリーで生まれた時，父Richard Bulstrodeは39歳，母Alice Knyffeは34歳であった。1484年にイギリスミッドレセックスでMary Empsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1517年8月2日に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリー ベルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Bulstrode(이)가 1458년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 헤저리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Bulstrode(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Knyffe(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1484년 영국 미들레세스에서 Mary Empson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1517년 8월 2일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이 발에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Bulstrode nasceu em 1458, em Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Bulstrode, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Alice Knyffe, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Empson em 1484, em Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 2 de agosto de 1517, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Bulstrode родился в 1458 г. в местности хеджирли, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Bulstrode было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Knyffe, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Empson в 1484 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 2 августа 1517 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности аилесбури веил, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
